name: Oven Roasted Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. In a large plastic bag or bowl, combine all ingredients. Seal the bag and shake, or toss in the bowl, until potatoes are evenly coated.
3. Transfer the potatoes to a shallow baking or roasting pan. Discard the bag.
4. Bake, stirring occasionally, for 40 minutes or until the potatoes are tender and golden brown.
5. Garnish with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
